recommendations.title: The Curse of Sleeping Beauty
recommendations.overview: Thomas Kaiser inherits an ancestral mansion that has been in his family for generations — only to learn that he has also inherited an ancient curse stemming back to the Crusades. Forced into his new role as “protector” — the guardian appointed to kee

recommendations.title: The Assent
recommendations.overview: After a series of disturbing supernatural events in his home, Joel a young single father, comes to suspect that his young son may be possessed. Soon Joel receives a visit from Father Lambert, a controversial exorcist in town whose last patient died d

recommendations.title: Cats
recommendations.overview: "Jellicle" cats join for a Jellicle ball where they rejoice with their leader, Old Deuteronomy. One cat will be chosen to go to the "Heavyside Layer" and be reborn.

recommendations.title: First Love
recommendations.overview: A young man’s difficult entry into adulthood, who experiences the highs and lows of his first love, while dealing with the familial fallout spurred by the financial crisis of 2008.

recommendations.title: Afterlife of the Party
recommendations.overview: A social butterfly who dies during her birthday week is given a second chance to right her wrongs on Earth.

recommendations.title: The Crow
recommendations.overview: Exactly one year after young rock guitarist Eric Draven and his fiancée are brutally killed by a ruthless gang of criminals, Draven, watched over by a hypnotic crow, returns from the grave to exact revenge.

recommendations.title: Outlaw
recommendations.overview: A group of people who feel betrayed by their government and let down by their police force form a modern-day outlaw posse in order to right what they see as the wrongs of society.

recommendations.title: Werewolf of London
recommendations.overview: A strange animal attack turns a botanist into a bloodthirsty monster.

recommendations.title: The Dressmaker
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Australia, beautiful, talented dressmaker Tilly returns to her tiny hometown to right wrongs from her past. As she tries to reconcile with her mother, she starts to fall in love while transforming the fashion of the town.

recommendations.title: Dead Man Down
recommendations.overview: In New York City, a crime lord's right-hand man is seduced by a woman seeking retribution.
